name: away_cold_day_setback_heat
description: Cold day (high 45F): home at start, classification applies heat mode. User leaves at 09:00 — P3 comfort band arms [setback_heat=62 / setback_cool=79] with active=ceiling. User returns at 17:00 — comfort_heat (70F) restored.
notes: P3 migration (Issue #249): select_comfort_band(away) always uses active='ceiling' regardless of day type.
The away band is [floor=setback_heat=62, ceiling=setback_cool=79, active=ceiling].
The ceiling (setback_cool=79F) is the primary defended edge — AC will not exceed 79F in an empty home.
The floor (setback_heat=62F) is the safety backstop — heat will fire if indoor drops below 62F.
P3 CHANGE: previous behavior branched on hvac_mode (heat→setback_heat, cool→setback_cool).
Now the band always covers both edges and active='ceiling' is the primary temperature.
comfort_restored on return: comfort_heat=70F (single setpoint, heat mode).
NOTE: expect_temp updated from 62F (old setback_heat target) to 79F (P3 band ceiling).

events.note: Cold winter morning: indoor 69F (slightly below comfort_heat=70F), outdoor 32F
User leaves — cold day so setback should be setback_heat=62F (NOT setback_cool)
Classification cycle while away — should reapply heat setback (62F)

assertions.reason: Cold-day classification: heat mode at comfort_heat=70F
P3: away setback arms band [setback_heat=62 / setback_cool=79] with active=ceiling. Primary temperature is ceiling=79F (setback_cool). Floor=62F remains as safety backstop.
P3: classification cycle while away reapplies away band ceiling=79F (setback_cool). Comfort NOT restored.
occupancy_home on cold/heat day: comfort_heat=70F restored

verdict.summary: P3: cold-day away setback arms dual band [62/79] with ceiling=setback_cool as primary; comfort restored on return
verdict.observed_behavior: classification_applied (heat, 70F) → setback_applied (ceiling=79F, away band) → setback maintained on cycle → comfort_restored (70F) on return
verdict.expected_behavior: P3 away setback covers both edges simultaneously. Ceiling=setback_cool is the primary edge. Floor=setback_heat guards against excessive cooling. Occupant returns to a home that was never too hot (>79F) or too cold (<62F).
